notes: Stage 2 generated real PNG files under public/images/generated.

Stage 2 revision v2 addresses user feedback: replaced top branches, detailed the D/M monogram, aligned countdown/timing blocks, strengthened location/dress-code backgrounds, and redrew button icon contrast.

Stage 2 revision v3 addresses additional user feedback: richer RSVP/dress-code backgrounds, centered FAQ, shadowless photo strip, improved timing background/text alignment, and rounded venue photo card.
Transparent assets were generated on #ff00ff chroma-key sheets, cropped, alpha-cleaned, and color-normalized locally.
No site code has been changed yet; integration waits for explicit design approval.
Stage 3 integrated the generated PNG assets into the live Next.js components and CSS.
Desktop and mobile verification screenshots are saved in test-results/stage3-implementation.
Post-integration fix: removed duplicated divider ornaments from timing/FAQ section background PNGs.
Post-integration fix: added countdown-panel-bg-clean-v3.png and switched Countdown to the clean single-outline panel background.

avoid: text or watermark inside PNG assets

kept the inner gold line as the single visible countdown border
saved as a separate transparent PNG for the live Countdown block

stageGates.stage1: Show design map and wait for user confirmation.
stageGates.stage2: Generate PNG files, save them to disk, update this manifest, create design/previews/site-design-v3.png, then wait for design approval.
stageGates.stage3: Generated PNG assets are integrated in the live Next.js layout; local desktop/mobile screenshots and checks are complete.

photoshopAvailability.stage2PrimaryPath: image generation PNG files saved into public/images/generated

preview.purpose: Revised desktop full-site design mockup composed from generated PNG assets after second feedback pass; not applied to live code yet.

botanical-sheet-v1.prompt: Create 8 separate premium botanical wedding invitation ornaments on a flat #ff00ff chroma-key background, arranged in a 4x2 grid: left/right botanical sprays, four floral corners, gold dust, countdown corner sprig. Delicate hand-drawn editorial line art, muted olive/sage leaves, champagne antique-gold buds, no labels, no text, no watermark.

icons-sheet-v1.prompt: Create 12 matching premium wedding line-art icons on a flat #ff00ff chroma-key background, arranged in a 4x3 grid: rings, heart, champagne glasses, cloche, pin, arrow, guest, envelope, guests, food, drink, note. Unified thin olive line art with antique gold highlights, no labels, no text, no watermark.

ui-decor-sheet-v1.prompt: Create 8 premium wedding UI decorative elements on a flat #ff00ff chroma-key background, arranged in a 4x2 grid: small divider, long divider, tiny heart, countdown unit frame, button ornaments left/right, photo tape, photo corner shadow. Delicate editorial style, antique gold, olive, warm off-white, no labels, no text, no watermark.

countdown-panel-v1.prompt: Create one wide rounded rectangle countdown panel background on a flat #ff00ff chroma-key background. Deep muted olive paper/satin texture, thin antique gold inner border, tiny botanical corner details, calm dark center for white HTML countdown digits, no text, no numbers, no watermark.

monogram-v1.prompt: Create one very delicate outline Cyrillic wedding monogram with exact letters Д and М only on a flat #ff00ff chroma-key background. Thin outline serif antique-gold line art, small muted olive botanical sprig, no extra text, no watermark.

top-botanical-v2.prompt: Create refined premium wedding botanical ornaments for the very top of a Russian wedding invitation: lighter left/right sprays and smaller hero sprigs, delicate sage leaves, champagne-gold buds, airy spacing, editorial hand-drawn line art, transparent-ready chroma-key background, no labels, no text, no watermark.

monogram-v2.prompt: Create a more detailed premium Cyrillic wedding monogram with exact letters Д and М, thin elegant antique-gold serif strokes, diagonal separator, botanical sprig woven through the letters, transparent-ready chroma-key background, no extra text, no watermark.

button-light-derived-v2.tool: local PNG derivation from generated assets
button-light-derived-v2.prompt: Create high-contrast off-white button icon variants from the generated arrow and heart visual system so the map and RSVP buttons read clearly on dark olive backgrounds.

section-backgrounds-v3.tool: local PNG composition from generated assets
section-backgrounds-v3.prompt: Create transparent reusable section background overlays from the generated botanical system: timing, venue, dress-code, FAQ, and RSVP overlays with subtle sage foliage, antique-gold dust, and airy premium wedding spacing.

countdown-cleanup-v3.tool: local PNG derivation from generated asset
countdown-cleanup-v3.prompt: Create a clean single-outline countdown background from the generated panel by removing the extra outer gold edge while preserving texture and botanical decoration.
